title: Home is the Ocean
overview: Over the past 20 years, the Schwörer family has sailed around the world while sharing their expedition examples of nature’s true beauty and inspiring people to live in balance with nature. Along the way, their family has grown, with six children being raised on their sailboat.

trailers.title: HOME IS THE OCEAN // Trailer // Kinostart 25. September
